title: Visualizing the World’s Largest Cloud Service Providers

Method of Making.comment: I think it was made with AI.

Representation Abstraction.comment: The literal cloud is used to describe a storage cloud.

contextualAttributes.comment: Spheres to look like cloud parts.

visualElements.comment: There is a metaphorical relationship to the data concept that it the cloud computing market.

visualChannels.comment: The total size of the cloud can be compared to the smaller parts to understand the market share.

visualElements.comment: The scene is quite abstract but related to the data concept.
